response.justification: While Bogdan has strong technical depth across 19+ years of software development and some infrastructure/CI/CD experience, he completely lacks the 2-year minimum people management requirement—a core requirement for this full-time people-leadership role. His technical background is primarily product-focused rather than developer tools, build systems, or test infrastructure, and there is no evidence of team leadership, direct reports, or organizational change experience. He would need proven management capabilities to be viable for a Level II manager position.
strengths: 19+ years of software development with senior/staff-level roles demonstrating strong technical depth across multiple languages and platforms
Infrastructure and CI/CD systems experience at Altom (GitLab instance management, CI servers, deploy automation with Docker/Artifactory)
Open-source project leadership and teaching experience showing ability to guide technical direction and mentor others through workshops
concerns: No demonstrated people management, team leadership, hiring, or direct report experience in resume—critical gap for a full-time people-leadership role
Technical background is primarily product/platform development rather than developer tools, build systems, test infrastructure, or compiler work required by the role
No evidence of leading organizational change initiatives or managing large-scale technical programs

key_factors.factor: Strong technical craftsmanship and infrastructure knowledge
